fields.name: justify
fields.label: Justify
fields.description: Distribution of children along the main axis.

fields.name: align
fields.label: Align
fields.description: Alignment of children along the cross axis.

fields.name: wrap
fields.label: Wrap
fields.description: Allow children to wrap onto multiple lines.

fields.name: width
fields.label: Width
fields.description:
Fixed width in px. Unset → the box sizes to its container/content. Set it to hold a
column at a constant width — e.g. the text column of a card whose right side is taken
by a decoration, so the copy reserves the left space and never runs under it.

fields.name: marginTop
fields.label: Margin Top
fields.description: Outer margin — top, px. Space ABOVE the box (separates list items / sections).

fields.name: marginBottom
fields.label: Margin Bottom
fields.description: Outer margin — bottom, px. Space BELOW the box (the usual list-item gap).

fields.name: clipContent
fields.label: Clip Content
fields.description:
Clip overflowing children to the card's rounded corners (`overflow: hidden`). Turn ON for a
full-bleed image that should round with the card, or a decoration that bleeds off an edge and
should be cut by the card. Leave OFF (default) so a legitimately-overflowing child (e.g. a
badge poking outside) isn't cut.

fields.name: x
fields.label: X
fields.description: Panel offset from the slide's left edge, px.

fields.name: y
fields.label: Y
fields.description: Panel offset from the slide's top edge, px.

fields.name: width
fields.label: Width
fields.description: Overlay panel width in px. Unset → the overlay fills the slide width.

fields.name: height
fields.label: Height
fields.description: Overlay panel height in px. Unset → the overlay fills the slide height.

fields.name: background
fields.label: Background
fields.description:
Panel background — any CSS background value: a colour incl. `rgba(...)` for
translucency, OR a gradient `linear-gradient(...)`. Overrides `scrim`. The editor
exposes this as a background picker (solid + alpha, or gradient).

fields.name: radius
fields.label: Radius
fields.description: Corner radius of the panel, px.

fields.name: placement
fields.label: Placement
fields.description:
Vertical placement of the content over the media (anchored mode — ignored
once children are absolutely placed via `Positioned`).

fields.name: align
fields.label: Align
fields.description: Horizontal alignment of the content (anchored mode).

fields.name: scrim
fields.label: Scrim
fields.description:
Dark gradient scrim so overlaid text stays legible on photos (and makes
descendant text white). Ignored when `background` is set.

fields.name: padding
fields.label: Padding
fields.description:
Inner padding (spacing token). Defaults to `none` so free-placed `Positioned`
blocks measure from the panel's own edge.

fields.name: children
fields.label: Children
fields.description: Content placed over the media — typically `Positioned` blocks for free x/y layout.

fields.name: x
fields.label: X
fields.description: Distance from the left edge, px. Ignored when `right` is set.

fields.name: y
fields.label: Y
fields.description: Distance from the top edge, px. Ignored when `bottom` is set.

fields.name: right
fields.label: Right
fields.description:
Distance from the RIGHT edge, px. Set this (instead of `x`) to anchor to the right —
use a NEGATIVE value to bleed the block off the edge (clipped by a `Card[clipContent]`).

fields.name: bottom
fields.label: Bottom
fields.description:
Distance from the BOTTOM edge, px. Set this (instead of `y`) to anchor to the bottom —
use a NEGATIVE value to bleed the block off the edge. Pair with `right` to tuck a
decoration into the bottom-right corner regardless of the card's height.

fields.name: width
fields.label: Width
fields.description: Width in px. Unset → sizes to its content.

fields.name: height
fields.label: Height
fields.description: Height in px. Unset → sizes to its content.

fields.name: children
fields.label: Children
fields.description: A single element to place (e.g. a Typography, an Image, a Tag).

fields.name: variant
fields.label: Variant
fields.description:
Typographic role — maps to dp-design's seed tokens (size / line-height / weight / colour),
read LIVE so it always matches the active dp theme.

fields.name: size
fields.label: Size
fields.description:
Font-size override mapped to dp's text scale (xs→Xsm · sm→Sm · md→Default · lg→Lg · xl→Xlg) —
falls back to the variant.

fields.name: weight
fields.label: Weight
fields.description: Font-weight preset override (regular 400 / medium 500 / bold 700) — falls back to the variant.

fields.name: color
fields.label: Color
fields.description:
Text colour override — a dp colour TOKEN NAME (e.g. "linkColor", resolved live against the
theme) or a raw CSS colour; falls back to the variant's dp foreground token.

fields.name: maxLines
fields.label: Max Lines
fields.description: Clamp to at most N lines with an ellipsis (0 = no clamp).

fields.name: badge
fields.label: Badge
fields.description: Pill label shown top-left over the image (e.g. "News").

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Description under the title (single line, ellipsised).

fields.name: items
fields.label: Items
fields.description: The cards to show. Each is a self-contained image card with an overlaid caption.

itemFields.name: action
itemFields.label: On click
itemFields.description: Per-card declarative click action (configured in the builder).

itemFields.name: badge
itemFields.label: Badge
itemFields.description: Pill label shown top-left over the image (e.g. "News").

itemFields.name: description
itemFields.label: Description
itemFields.description: Description under the title (single line, ellipsised).

fields.name: cardWidth
fields.label: Card Width
fields.description: Each card's width as a % of the viewport — the rest peeks, like a Swiper.

fields.name: imagesList
fields.label: Images List
fields.description: The slides — each a full-bleed image with an optional overlay.

itemFields.name: content
itemFields.label: Content
itemFields.description: Overlay content placed over the image — drop an `Overlay` here for free x/y layout.

fields.name: height
fields.label: Height
fields.description: Slide height in px (the image fills the width).

fields.name: imageFit
fields.label: Image Fit
fields.description: How each image fills its slide.

fields.name: dots
fields.label: Dots
fields.description: Show the pagination dots under the carousel.

fields.name: loop
fields.label: Loop
fields.description: Loop back to the first slide after the last.

fields.name: autoplayInterval
fields.label: Autoplay Interval
fields.description: Auto-advance interval in ms (0 = no autoplay).

fields.name: image
fields.label: Image
fields.description: Hero image — the full-width banner at the top.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.defaultValue: Your all-in-one pass to Beijing. Pick from xx+ attractions & experience. Bundle together and save up to 50%.

fields.name: headingSize
fields.label: Heading Size
fields.description: Heading size preset (sm / md / lg / xl), mapped to dp's text scale.

fields.name: items
fields.label: Items
fields.description: The cards in the carousel (image + badge + title + description each).

itemFields.name: action
itemFields.label: On click
itemFields.description: Per-card declarative click action (configured in the builder).

itemFields.name: badge
itemFields.label: Badge
itemFields.description: Pill label shown top-left over the image (e.g. "News").

itemFields.name: description
itemFields.label: Description
itemFields.description: Description under the title (single line, ellipsised).

fields.name: headingSize
fields.label: Heading Size
fields.description: Heading size preset (sm / md / lg / xl), mapped to dp's text scale.

fields.name: itemTitleWeight
fields.label: Item Title Weight
fields.description: Weight of each card's title (regular 400 / medium 500 / bold 700).

fields.name: viewAllText
fields.label: View All Text
fields.description: "View all" link text (leave empty to hide it).

fields.name: viewAllHref
fields.label: View All Href
fields.description: URL the "View all" link points to.

fields.name: viewAllSize
fields.label: View All Size
fields.description: "View all" link size preset (sm / md / lg / xl).

fields.name: viewAllWeight
fields.label: View All Weight
fields.description: "View all" link weight preset (regular 400 / medium 500 / bold 700).

fields.name: headingSize
fields.label: Heading Size
fields.description: Heading size preset (sm / md / lg / xl), mapped to dp's text scale.

fields.name: itemCtaWeight
fields.label: Item Cta Weight
fields.description: Weight of each card's CTA text.

itemFields.name: description
itemFields.label: Description
itemFields.defaultValue: More airports, more ways to simplify your travel.

itemFields.name: action
itemFields.label: On click
itemFields.description: Per-card click action (the CTA / whole card).

itemFields.name: description
itemFields.label: Description
itemFields.defaultValue: More airports, more ways to simplify your travel.

itemFields.name: action
itemFields.label: On click
itemFields.description: Per-card click action (the CTA / whole card).

fields.name: image
fields.label: Image
fields.description: Hero image (fills the card top edge-to-edge, clipped to the rounded corners).

fields.name: badge
fields.label: Badge
fields.description: Badge text overlaid on the image (top-left). Leave empty to hide it.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.defaultValue: Travel connected from the moment you arrive

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.defaultValue: Skip roaming fees and enjoy reliable data throughout your trip

fields.name: linkText
fields.label: Link Text
fields.description: Call-to-action link text (the blue link). Leave empty to hide it.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.defaultValue: A faster way through the airport

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.defaultValue: Skip the queues through security and immigration

fields.name: linkText
fields.label: Link Text
fields.description: Call-to-action link text (the blue link). Leave empty to hide it.

fields.name: decoration
fields.label: Decoration
fields.description: Decoration image on the right — bleeds off the card edge and is clipped to the rounded corner.

fields.name: decorationWidth
fields.label: Decoration Width
fields.description: Decoration width in px (how much of the right side it occupies).

fields.name: lineCount
fields.label: Line Count
fields.description: The number of lines to display in the skeleton.

fields.name: children
fields.label: Children
fields.description: The content to display inside the skeleton

fields.name: showSkeleton
fields.label: Show Skeleton
fields.description: Whether the text is show skeleton.

fields.name: isTitle
fields.label: Is Title
fields.description: Whether to render as a title skeleton.

fields.name: fit
fields.label: How the image fills the space

answers.scale-down: Original size, shrunk if too big

fields.name: alt
fields.label: Description for screen readers
fields.help: What the picture shows. Leave empty only if it is purely decorative.

fields.name: children
fields.label: Button text
fields.help: Name the action, e.g. "Book a table" — not "Click here".

fields.name: round
fields.label: Round
fields.description: Whether the tag has rounded corners.

fields.name: content
fields.label: The message
fields.help: One or two sentences. Say what happened and what to do next.

fields.name: subtotal
fields.label: Subtotal
fields.description: Content to display in subtotal section

fields.name: entitlement
fields.label: Entitlement
fields.description: Content to display in entitlement section

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: Title to display in the header

fields.name: theme
fields.label: Theme
fields.description: Theme of the NavHeader, default is 'light'

fields.name: showForce
fields.label: Show Force
fields.description: Whether to show the header nav

fields.name: rightContent
fields.label: Right Content
fields.description: Render function for the right side of the header

fields.name: leftContent
fields.label: Left Content
fields.description: Render function for the left side of the header

fields.name: showDivider
fields.label: Show Divider
fields.description: Whether to hide the divider of the data row

fields.name: children
fields.label: Children
fields.description: ReactNode to render as the link content

fields.name: url
fields.label: Url
fields.description: Link configuration information including URL and type

fields.name: text
fields.label: Text
fields.description: Text for the add card button.

fields.name: suffix
fields.label: Suffix
fields.description: Custom suffix for the add card button.

fields.name: prefix
fields.label: Prefix
fields.description: Custom prefix for the add card button.

fields.name: content
fields.label: Content
fields.description:
Custom content for the add card button.
If content is provided, the text and prefix will not be displayed.

fields.name: bordered
fields.label: Bordered
fields.description: Whether show outer border or not

itemFields.name: disabled
itemFields.label: Disabled
itemFields.description: Whether the collapse item is disabled

itemFields.name: disabled
itemFields.label: Disabled
itemFields.description: Whether the tab item is disabled.

itemFields.name: children
itemFields.label: Children
itemFields.description: Additional CSS class name for the tab item.

fields.name: stickyHeader
fields.label: Sticky Header
fields.description: Whether the tab header is sticky.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: The description text to display below the segmented control

fields.name: defaultValue
fields.label: Default Value
fields.description: The default value of the segmented control

fields.name: value
fields.label: Value
fields.description: The current value of the segmented control

fields.name: disabled
fields.label: Disabled
fields.description: Whether the segmented control is disabled

fields.name: block
fields.label: Block
fields.description: Whether the segmented control is block-level

fields.name: children
fields.label: Children
fields.description: Main content. It fills the remaining height between header and footer.

fields.name: closeOnDragDown
fields.label: Close On Drag Down
fields.description: Whether to close the sheet when dragging down at the minimum anchor.

fields.name: lockScroll
fields.label: Lock Scroll
fields.description: Whether to lock page scrolling while the sheet is rendered.

fields.name: disabled
fields.label: Disabled
fields.description: Whether the calendar select is disabled

fields.name: showIcon
fields.label: Show Icon
fields.description: Whether to show the calendar icon

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Description text below the calendar select

fields.name: selectionMode
fields.label: Selection Mode
fields.description: Selection mode, if not set, selection is not supported

fields.name: primaryButtonText
fields.label: Primary Button Text
fields.description: Primary button text, button will not show if text is undefined, null or empty

fields.name: secondaryButtonText
fields.label: Secondary Button Text
fields.description: Secondary button text, button will not show if text is undefined, null or empty

fields.name: buttonsDirection
fields.label: Buttons Direction
fields.description: Button layout direction, 'vertical' (column) or 'horizontal' (row), default is 'vertical'

fields.name: label
fields.label: Label
fields.description: Label text or React node displayed above the stepper

fields.name: footer
fields.label: Footer
fields.description: Footer text or React node displayed below the stepper

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Description text to display above the form.

fields.name: showTags
fields.label: Show Tags
fields.description: Whether to show the tags selection section.

fields.name: showComment
fields.label: Show Comment
fields.description: Whether to show the comment text area section.

itemFields.name: groupName
itemFields.label: Group Name
itemFields.description: Display name for the filter group

itemFields.name: groupId
itemFields.label: Group Id
itemFields.description: Unique identifier for the filter group

fields.name: block
fields.label: Block
fields.description: Whether the data items are blocks

fields.name: steps
fields.label: Steps
fields.description: Steps to display in the guide. Each step contains a title, optional description, and image URL.

fields.name: fallbackImage
fields.label: Fallback Image
fields.description: Fallback image URL if the step image fails to load.

fields.name: showDefaultFooter
fields.label: Show Default Footer
fields.description: Whether to show the default footer with image counter.

fields.name: showCloseIcon
fields.label: Show Close Icon
fields.description: Whether to show the close icon button.

fields.name: areaPlaceholder
fields.label: Area Placeholder
fields.description: Placeholder for the area code input

fields.name: showCountrySearch
fields.label: Show Country Search
fields.description: Whether to show country search modal - defaults to true

fields.name: closeOnMaskClick
fields.label: Close On Mask Click
fields.description: whether to close modal when clicking mask

fields.name: items
fields.label: Items
fields.description: List of items to display in the overview

itemFields.name: showDivider
itemFields.label: Show Divider
itemFields.description: Whether to hide the divider of the data row

fields.name: showItemDivider
fields.label: Show Item Divider
fields.description: Whether to hide the divider between items

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: Title text displayed above the policy agreement

fields.name: preSlot
fields.label: Pre Slot
fields.description: Custom content slot before policy text

fields.name: debounceTime
fields.label: Debounce Time
fields.description:
Debounce time in milliseconds after getPolicyUrl completes
Used to prevent multiple windows from opening due to repeated clicks

fields.name: itemList
fields.label: Item List
fields.description: List of product items to display

fields.name: direction
fields.label: Direction
fields.description: Layout mode (vertical/horizontal). In horizontal layout mode, splits into left/right columns

fields.name: trackWidth
fields.label: Track Width
fields.description: The width of progress bar track

fields.name: size
fields.label: Size
fields.description: The diameter of circle bar (120px by default) or the width of line bar (160px by default)

fields.name: isSemiCircle
fields.label: Is Semi Circle
fields.description: Whether the progress circle is semi circle

fields.name: text
fields.label: Text
fields.description: Text content of the progress circle. Can be boolean, ReactNode, or a function.

fields.name: fillColor
fields.label: Fill Color
fields.description: The fill color of progress circle

fields.name: text
fields.label: Text
fields.description:
The text to display alongside the progress segment
Defaults to empty string if not specified

fields.name: textPosition
fields.label: Text Position
fields.description:
The position of the text relative to the progress bar
Defaults to 'bottom' if not specified

fields.name: currentStep
fields.label: Current Step
fields.description:
The current step in the progress sequence
Defaults to 0 if not specified

fields.name: totalSteps
fields.label: Total Steps
fields.description:
The total number of steps in the progress sequence
Defaults to 4 if not specified

fields.name: prefix
fields.label: Prefix
fields.description:
Prefix to be added before the current step number
Defaults to empty string if not specified

itemFields.name: badge
itemFields.label: Badge
itemFields.description: Badge，the same as Badge content prop

itemFields.name: icon
itemFields.label: Icon
itemFields.description: Icon，the same as TabBar.Item icon prop

fields.name: safeArea
fields.label: Safe Area
fields.description: Whether to enable safe area insets

fields.name: loading
fields.label: Loading
fields.description: Whether the QR code is loading

fields.name: icon
fields.label: Icon
fields.description: Icon in the center, can be ReactNode, image, or SVG

fields.name: iconSize
fields.label: Icon Size
fields.description: Icon size, defaults to 28% of QR code size

fields.name: qrCodeClassName
fields.label: Qr Code Class Name
fields.description: Additional CSS class name for the QR code

fields.name: showRefreshButton
fields.label: Show Refresh Button
fields.description: Whether to show the refresh button when status is expired, default true

fields.name: bordered
fields.label: Bordered
fields.description: Whether to show the border, defaults to true

fields.name: color
fields.label: Color
fields.description: Foreground color of the QR code (default: #000)

fields.name: bgColor
fields.label: Bg Color
fields.description: Background color of the QR code (default: #fff)

fields.name: provider
fields.label: Provider
fields.description:
Provider info below QR code
- true: show default provider info
- ReactNode: show custom provider content
- false: hide provider info (default)

fields.name: providerDescription
fields.label: Provider Description
fields.description: Description text below the provider logo (only works when provider is true)

fields.name: caption
fields.label: Caption
fields.description: Caption text displayed below the QR code (inside the white background box)

fields.name: captionClassName
fields.label: Caption Class Name
fields.description: Additional CSS class name for the caption

fields.name: primaryButtonText
fields.label: Primary Button Text
fields.description: Primary button text, button will not show if text is undefined, null or empty

fields.name: secondaryButtonText
fields.label: Secondary Button Text
fields.description: Secondary button text, button will not show if text is undefined, null or empty

fields.name: buttonsDirection
fields.label: Buttons Direction
fields.description: Button layout direction, 'vertical' (column) or 'horizontal' (row), default is 'vertical'

fields.name: rounded
fields.label: Rounded
fields.description: Whether to round the search bar

fields.name: hideSingleTabBar
fields.label: Hide Single Tab Bar
fields.description: Whether to show a single tab bar

fields.name: emptyContent
fields.label: Empty Content
fields.description: Empty content for the search list

fields.name: clearIcon
fields.label: Clear Icon
fields.description: Clear icon for the search list

fields.name: recentList
fields.label: Recent List
fields.description: Recent list for the search list

fields.name: defaultDataSource
fields.label: Default Data Source
fields.description: Default data source for the search list

fields.name: dataSource
fields.label: Data Source
fields.description: Data source for the search list

fields.name: type
fields.label: Type
fields.description:
The selection mode type.
- 'panel': Opens a full-screen drawer panel with options (mobile-friendly)
- 'dropdown': Opens a dropdown list below the input (desktop-friendly)

fields.name: value
fields.label: Value
fields.description: The value of the selected option.

fields.name: defaultValue
fields.label: Default Value
fields.description: Default value of the selected option.

fields.name: options
fields.label: Options
fields.description: The options to display in the select input.

itemFields.name: label
itemFields.label: Label
itemFields.description:
The label to display for the option.
For panel mode, only string is supported.
For dropdown mode, both string and ReactNode are supported.

itemFields.name: value
itemFields.label: Value
itemFields.description: The value associated with the option.

fields.name: placeholder

fields.description: The placeholder text to display when no option is selected.

fields.name: inputIcon
fields.label: Input Icon
fields.description: The icon to display on the right side of the input.

fields.name: maxHeight

fields.description: Maximum height of the dropdown list (only for dropdown type).

fields.name: emptyContent
fields.label: Empty Content
fields.description: The content to display when there are no options.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Description text or React node displayed below the label

fields.name: footer

fields.name: mouseWheel

fields.description: Whether to enable mouse wheel scrolling

fields.name: preSlot

fields.description: Custom content slot before policy text

fields.name: disabled
fields.label: Disabled
fields.description: Whether the time select is disabled

fields.name: showIcon
fields.label: Show Icon
fields.description: Whether to show the clock icon

fields.name: multiple
fields.label: Multiple
fields.description: Whether to allow multiple time selection

fields.name: data
fields.label: Data
fields.description: Time data configuration for the selection panel

fields.name: visible
fields.label: Visible
fields.description: Whether the time selector is visible

fields.name: rateTitle
fields.label: Rate Title
fields.description: Title text for the rating card.

fields.name: rateDescription
fields.label: Rate Description
fields.description: Description text for the rating card.

fields.name: rateSubmitButtonText
fields.label: Rate Submit Button Text
fields.description: Text for the submit button in the rating card.

fields.name: dialogTitle
fields.label: Dialog Title
fields.description: Title text for the feedback dialog.

fields.name: dialogDescription
fields.label: Dialog Description
fields.description: Description text for the feedback dialog.

fields.name: dialogSubmitText
fields.label: Dialog Submit Text
fields.description: Text for the submit button in the feedback dialog.

fields.name: dialogCancelText
fields.label: Dialog Cancel Text
fields.description: Text for the cancel button in the feedback dialog.

fields.name: submittedTitle

fields.name: submittedDescription

fields.name: items

fields.description: Product list, at least 1 item required
